content.en:
Kungo Temple.

Ye Tian came here and saw the Kunwu Supreme.

However, he saw the solemnity on the face of the Kunwu Supreme.

Clearly, something big is happening!

"Ye Tian, you're here!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"Kunwu Supreme, could it be that something big happened?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Hmm!" Kungo Supreme nodded, "Not only has something big happened, but it's also an earth-shattering big thing, even bigger than the last time the Chaos of Destroying Creatures!"

"What?"

Ye Tian was shocked, and hurriedly said, "Could it be that the Protoss wants to invade the Human Race?"

"No, it's a big event that affects the entire universe!" Kunwu Supreme said: "Let me reveal a few things to you first, ten years ago, there was a change in the ruins world, and a Tianzun of the god clan was guarding outside the ruins world and was killed! The golden god clan who came out of the ruins world in the last universe era! Soon after, the Yuangu Hall reappeared, some ancient supremes appeared, and the strong people who went to investigate the news were bombarded and killed, and even a high-level race was wiped out in an instant, and that place became the territory of the Yuangu Palace. Not long ago, there was an accident in the ghost gate tower in the holy city, the supreme of the Hades civilization tried to rush out of the ghost gate, and was suppressed by many of our supremes, if we didn't stop it in time, otherwise they rushed out, our human race would definitely not be able to resist. But even so, many Supreme souls have been hit hard, fortunately you provided the Hades Secret Book before, otherwise this time it is estimated that there will be a Supreme Soul to fall. Immediately after that, we threw away the ghost door. It is said that the supreme of the Hades civilization rushed out of the ghost gate and currently occupies an area of the universe. "

"This ......"

Ye Tian was completely shocked.

"Kunwu Supreme, aren't those supremes the powerhouses of the last cosmic epoch or even multiple cosmic epochs?

"Yes, once the great destruction of the universe comes, the Supremes will also die, and only the transcendent can live, but these Supremes agree that time will come to life, but there are not many Supremes who have come to life, there should be a special way, but there is no way to make all the Supremes come alive, otherwise there are so many cosmic epochs, and the number of Supremes is far more than the Supremes of our current cosmic era. There are not many supremes that can appear, which is why the races of our universe have not been destroyed immediately. In addition, in addition to those supremes, there were also some galaxy-level and galaxy-level cultivators who appeared, and the combat power of these cultivators was extremely terrifying, and an invincible galaxy-level powerhouse of the angel clan at the level of the Son of the Universe was killed by one of the galaxy-level cultivators in one blow, and then there was a supreme-level highness who challenged him, and he was still killed in seconds. According to our guess, that man is probably the Son of the Era!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"What!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

It's just that the Supreme can survive, galaxy-level and galaxy-level can survive from multiple cosmic epochs to the present?

It's incredible, isn't it?

"Supreme Kunwu, we have also been to those ruins before, if those people stay in the ruins, why would they give us so many benefits and inheritances, wouldn't this make our cosmic era stronger?" Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

Kunwu Supreme guessed: "Maybe this is the way to stop us from doubting these ruins, and we won't try to destroy these ruins, otherwise, we may destroy their plans! Besides, we don't know how deep the background of those forces is, maybe the benefits they have come up with are just the tip of the iceberg!"

Immediately, he said: "Judging from the current situation, the forces of multiple cosmic epochs have appeared, and each force is basically the overlord of a certain cosmic era, except for some supreme beings, there are also some sons of the era and supreme-level highnesses. As for the other cultivators, they didn't appear, and they should have really died in the Great Destruction of the Universe. As for how these people escaped the Great Universe Apocalypse, it is unclear. "

"Supreme Kunwu, call me this time, is there anything else you need me to do?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There is indeed a need for you!" Kunwu Supreme said: "When those forces appeared, although they clashed with the races of the universe, after all, they had not really started a major war, and I estimated that those supremes should still be suppressed, otherwise the supreme of our universe would definitely not be able to stop them." Not long ago, the various races of the universe represented by the gods and demons met with those forces in the form of incarnations and started a meeting, and those forces said that they wanted to see the geniuses of this universe, and they sent three galaxy-level to arrange a ring in front of the black hole in the center of the universe, and the stake was the territory. If we lose one, we need to pay 100 star fields, and if we win one, they will not do anything to the races of the universe for 100,000 years. "

"This condition is too unfavorable for all races in the universe, right, the Protoss and the Demon Race agreed?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Agreed!" Kunwu Supreme said: "It was the first god lord of the god clan and the first demon lord of the demon race who jointly agreed, because the first god lord of the god clan sensed a lot of breath stronger than him, if he didn't agree, once the war started, even if the supreme of those forces was scarce, we estimated that we would pay countless supreme lives to be able to defeat them, and we might even lose this war!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Without knowing the enemy's forces and their true intentions, it is indeed better to choose compromise.

"Ye Tian, the Protoss and the Demon Race will send a galaxy-level powerhouse, and the third place, the Protoss and the Demon Race want you to participate!"

"The Protoss and the Demon Clan let me go? Could it be that they want to use those sons of the era to get rid of me?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"That's not the case!" Kun Wu Supreme said: "If you say it before, the Protoss and the Demon Race may not want you to grow up, but now that the Children of the Era have appeared, and it is not one or two, the Protoss and the Demon Race will not deal with you again, they just hope that our Cosmic Era can win one game, because they know that their galaxy level cannot win, and they will not send a strong galaxy level, basically give up the first two games, and focus on you!" Of course, the Protoss and the Demon Race have also given benefits, if you are willing to participate, the Protoss is willing to let you enter the Divine and Demon Heaven to cultivate for ten years. "

"God and Demon Heaven, what kind of place is that?"

Ye Tian asked.

Kunwu Supreme explained: "The Gods and Demons Heaven is a special world jointly ruled by the Gods and Demons, if you cultivate in the Gods and Demons, you can comprehend the Great Dao faster, and you can see the evolution of the Great Dao there, which is enough to make your Chaos Dao realm soar! Even among the Divine Race and the Demon Race, there are very few people who enter the Divine and Demon Heaven, and the reason why the Divine and Demon Heaven is special is because of a special energy there, and this energy needs to be accumulated over a long period of time. If you are allowed to comprehend for ten years, it is enough to consume many years of accumulation of gods and demons. Ye Tian, although the opportunity given by the Protoss and the Demon Clan is very good, it is very dangerous if you agree, and no one knows how powerful those sons of the era are. "

"What if I don't say yes?"

Ye Tian asked.

Kunwu Supreme sighed: "All three battles are lost, all races in the universe will give up 300 star fields, and our human race is estimated to give up one or two star fields, who makes our human race not the top cosmic race." But if you agree to join the war, even if you lose, the Terrans don't need to pay the price of the star field!"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment and said, "I'm willing to participate, I just want to know how strong those sons of the era are!"
